description: Dashboard for Istio service mesh Prometheus metrics, covering traffic, latency, errors, TCP telemetry, and mTLS posture.
title: Istio Service Mesh Dashboard

namespace.name: namespace
namespace.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT JSONExtractString(labels, 'destination_workload_namespace')
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name='istio_requests_total'
AND JSONExtractString(labels, 'reporter')='destination'
AND JSONExtractString(labels, 'destination_workload_namespace') != ''
AND fingerprint GLOBAL IN
(
  SELECT DISTINCT fingerprint FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4
  WHERE metric_name='istio_requests_total'
  AND unix_milli > toUnixTimestamp(now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) * 1000
)

service_name.name: service_name
service_name.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT JSONExtractString(labels, 'destination_service_name')
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name='istio_requests_total'
AND JSONExtractString(labels, 'reporter')='destination'
AND JSONExtractString(labels, 'destination_workload_namespace')={{.namespace}}
AND JSONExtractString(labels, 'destination_service_name') != ''
AND fingerprint GLOBAL IN
(
  SELECT DISTINCT fingerprint FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4
  WHERE metric_name='istio_requests_total'
  AND unix_milli > toUnixTimestamp(now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) * 1000
)

destination_service.name: destination_service
destination_service.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT JSONExtractString(labels, 'destination_service')
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name='istio_requests_total'
AND JSONExtractString(labels, 'reporter')='destination'
AND JSONExtractString(labels, 'destination_workload_namespace')={{.namespace}}
AND JSONExtractString(labels, 'destination_service_name')={{.service_name}}
AND JSONExtractString(labels, 'destination_service') != ''
AND fingerprint GLOBAL IN
(
  SELECT DISTINCT fingerprint FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4
  WHERE metric_name='istio_requests_total'
  AND unix_milli > toUnixTimestamp(now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) * 1000
)

source_workload.description: Source workload calling the selected service
source_workload.name: source_workload
source_workload.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT JSONExtractString(labels, 'source_workload')
FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name='istio_requests_total'
AND JSONExtractString(labels, 'reporter')='destination'
AND JSONExtractString(labels, 'destination_workload_namespace')={{.namespace}}
AND JSONExtractString(labels, 'destination_service_name')={{.service_name}}
AND JSONExtractString(labels, 'destination_service')={{.destination_service}}
AND JSONExtractString(labels, 'source_workload') != ''
AND fingerprint GLOBAL IN
(
  SELECT DISTINCT fingerprint FROM signoz_metrics.distributed_samples_v4
  WHERE metric_name='istio_requests_total'
  AND unix_milli > toUnixTimestamp(now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) * 1000
)

widgets.description: HTTP request rate for the selected source and destination workloads.
widgets.title: Request Rate

filter.expression: reporter = 'destination' AND destination_workload_namespace = $namespace AND destination_service_name = $service_name AND destination_service = $destination_service AND source_workload = $source_workload

widgets.description: Median request latency for the selected service path.
widgets.title: Request Duration P50

filter.expression: reporter = 'destination' AND destination_workload_namespace = $namespace AND destination_service_name = $service_name AND destination_service = $destination_service AND source_workload = $source_workload

widgets.description: P90 request latency for the selected service path.
widgets.title: Request Duration P90

filter.expression: reporter = 'destination' AND destination_workload_namespace = $namespace AND destination_service_name = $service_name AND destination_service = $destination_service AND source_workload = $source_workload

widgets.description: P99 request latency for the selected service path.
widgets.title: Request Duration P99

filter.expression: reporter = 'destination' AND destination_workload_namespace = $namespace AND destination_service_name = $service_name AND destination_service = $destination_service AND source_workload = $source_workload

widgets.description: Average request payload size over time.
widgets.title: Request Size

filter.expression: reporter = 'destination' AND destination_workload_namespace = $namespace AND destination_service_name = $service_name AND destination_service = $destination_service AND source_workload = $source_workload

widgets.description: Average response payload size over time.
widgets.title: Response Size

filter.expression: reporter = 'destination' AND destination_workload_namespace = $namespace AND destination_service_name = $service_name AND destination_service = $destination_service AND source_workload = $source_workload

widgets.description: HTTP 4xx responses per second for the selected service.
widgets.title: 4xx Request Rate

filter.expression: reporter = 'destination' AND destination_workload_namespace = $namespace AND destination_service_name = $service_name AND destination_service = $destination_service AND response_code IN ['400', '401', '402', '403', '404', '405', '406', '407', '408', '409', '410', '411', '412', '413', '414', '415', '416', '417', '418', '421', '422', '423', '424', '425', '426', '428', '429', '431', '451']

widgets.description: HTTP 5xx responses per second for the selected service.
widgets.title: 5xx Request Rate

filter.expression: reporter = 'destination' AND destination_workload_namespace = $namespace AND destination_service_name = $service_name AND destination_service = $destination_service AND response_code IN ['500', '501', '502', '503', '504', '505', '506', '507', '508', '510', '511']

widgets.description: 4xx and 5xx response codes broken down over time.
widgets.title: Error Rate by Response Code

widgets.description: Destination services with the highest 4xx and 5xx request rate in the selected namespace.
widgets.title: Top Error Services

widgets.description: P90 request latency grouped by destination service for the selected source workload.
widgets.title: Latency by Destination Service

filter.expression: reporter = 'destination' AND destination_workload_namespace = $namespace AND source_workload = $source_workload

widgets.description: Request rate grouped by callers of the selected destination service.
widgets.title: Throughput by Source Workload

filter.expression: reporter = 'destination' AND destination_workload_namespace = $namespace AND destination_service_name = $service_name AND destination_service = $destination_service

widgets.description: Request rate grouped by destination service for the selected source workload.
widgets.title: Throughput by Destination Service

filter.expression: reporter = 'destination' AND destination_workload_namespace = $namespace AND source_workload = $source_workload

widgets.description: TCP bytes sent per second for the selected service path.
widgets.title: TCP Bytes Sent

filter.expression: reporter = 'destination' AND destination_workload_namespace = $namespace AND destination_service_name = $service_name AND destination_service = $destination_service AND source_workload = $source_workload

widgets.description: TCP bytes received per second for the selected service path.
widgets.title: TCP Bytes Received

filter.expression: reporter = 'destination' AND destination_workload_namespace = $namespace AND destination_service_name = $service_name AND destination_service = $destination_service AND source_workload = $source_workload

widgets.description: TCP connections opened per second for the selected service path.
widgets.title: TCP Connections Opened

filter.expression: reporter = 'destination' AND destination_workload_namespace = $namespace AND destination_service_name = $service_name AND destination_service = $destination_service AND source_workload = $source_workload

widgets.description: TCP connections closed per second for the selected service path.
widgets.title: TCP Connections Closed

filter.expression: reporter = 'destination' AND destination_workload_namespace = $namespace AND destination_service_name = $service_name AND destination_service = $destination_service AND source_workload = $source_workload

widgets.description: Request rate split by Istio connection security policy.
widgets.title: Traffic by Security Policy

filter.expression: reporter = 'destination' AND destination_workload_namespace = $namespace AND destination_service_name = $service_name AND destination_service = $destination_service

widgets.description: Share of traffic protected by mutual TLS.
widgets.title: mTLS Traffic Share

filter.expression: reporter = 'destination' AND destination_workload_namespace = $namespace AND destination_service_name = $service_name AND destination_service = $destination_service AND connection_security_policy = 'mutual_tls'

reporter = 'destination' AND destination_workload_namespace = $namespace AND destination_service_name = $service_name AND destination_service = $destination_service AND connection_security_policy IN ['none', 'unknown']

widgets.description: Share of traffic not protected by mutual TLS.
widgets.title: Plaintext Traffic Share

filter.expression: reporter = 'destination' AND destination_workload_namespace = $namespace AND destination_service_name = $service_name AND destination_service = $destination_service AND connection_security_policy = 'mutual_tls'

reporter = 'destination' AND destination_workload_namespace = $namespace AND destination_service_name = $service_name AND destination_service = $destination_service AND connection_security_policy IN ['none', 'unknown']
